_README: Registrar AUTHORITY actions — re-applied every sync AFTER feed ingestion, so they take precedence over Affinity/PlayMetrics. Copy to data/cert_actions.json (gitignored) and edit. Identify a person by participant_id | aysoid | email.

actions._comment: Registrar verified a cert by document review (overrides/supplements the feed).
Grant a one-off exemption from a requirement.
Admit a volunteer to a role for a season even if a feed hasn't caught up.
Deny / remove a role for a season (re-applied each sync, so it sticks).
Force a PlayMetrics identity to resolve to a known AYSO participant.
